| group3 = [[Metaethics|Meta]] | list3 = * [[Moral absolutism|Absolutism]] * [[Axiological ethics|Axiology]] * [[Cognitivism (ethics)|Cognitivism]] ** [[Moral realism|Realism]] *** [[Ethical naturalism|Naturalism]] *** [[Ethical non-naturalism|Non-naturalism]] ** [[Ethical subjectivism|Subjectivism]] *** [[Ideal observer theory]] *** [[Divine command theory]] * [[Moral constructivism|Constructivism]] * [[Euthyphro dilemma]] * [[Ethical intuitionism|Intuitionism]] * [[Moral nihilism|Nihilism]] * [[Non-cognitivism]] ** [[Emotivism]] ** [[Expressivism]] ** [[Quasi-realism]] ** [[Universal prescriptivism]] * [[Moral rationalism|Rationalism]] * [[Moral relativism|Relativism]] * [[Moral skepticism|Skepticism]] * [[Moral universalism|Universalism]] ** [[Value pluralism|Value monism – Value pluralism]]
| group4 = Schools | list4 = * [[Buddhist ethics|Buddhist]] * [[Christian ethics|Christian]] ** [[Protestant work ethic|Protestant]] * [[Confucianism|Confucian]] * [[Epicureanism|Epicurean]] * [[Existentialism|Existentialist]] * [[Feminist ethics|Feminist]] * [[Islamic ethics|Islamic]] * [[Jewish ethics|Jewish]] * [[Kantian ethics|Kantian]] * [[Rousseauism|Rousseauian]] * [[Stoicism|Stoic]] * [[Taoism|Tao]]

| group3 = [[Metaethics|Meta]] | list3 = * [[Moral absolutism|Absolutism]] * [[Axiological ethics|Axiology]] * [[Cognitivism (ethics)|Cognitivism]] ** [[Moral realism|Realism]] *** [[Ethical naturalism|Naturalism]] *** [[Ethical non-naturalism|Non-naturalism]] ** [[Ethical subjectivism|Subjectivism]] *** [[Ideal observer theory]] *** [[:en:Divine command theory|Divine command theory]] * [[Moral constructivism|Constructivism]] * [[:en:Euthyphro dilemma|Euthyphro dilemma]] * [[Ethical intuitionism|Intuitionism]] * [[Moral nihilism|Nihilism]] * [[Non-cognitivism]] ** [[Emotivism]] ** [[Expressivism]] ** [[Quasi-realism]] ** [[Universal prescriptivism]] * [[Moral rationalism|Rationalism]] * [[Moral relativism|Relativism]] * [[Moral skepticism|Skepticism]] * [[Moral universalism|Universalism]] ** [[Value pluralism|Value monism – Value pluralism]]
| group4 = Schools | list4 = * [[Buddhist ethics|Buddhist]] * [[Christian ethics|Christian]] ** [[Protestant work ethic|Protestant]] * [[Confucianism|Confucian]] * [[:en:Epicureanism|Epicurean]] * [[:en:Existentialism|Existentialist]] * [[Feminist ethics|Feminist]] * [[Islamic ethics|Islamic]] * [[Jewish ethics|Jewish]] * [[Kantian ethics|Kantian]] * [[Rousseauism|Rousseauian]] * [[Stoicism|Stoic]] * [[Taoism|Tao]]

| group2 = [[:en:Applied ethics|Applied]] | list2 = * [[:en:Animal ethics|Animal]] * [[Ethics of artificial intelligence|Artificial intelligence]] * [[:en:Bioethics|Bio]] * [[:en:Business ethics|Business]] * [[Computer ethics|Computer]] * [[Discourse ethics|Discourse]] * [[Economic ethics|Economic]] * [[Engineering ethics|Engineering]] * [[Environmental ethics|Environmental]] ** [[Land ethic|Land]] * [[Legal ethics|Legal]] * [[Machine ethics|Machine]] * [[Marketing ethics|Marketing]] * [[Ethics of eating meat|Meat eating]] * [[Media ethics|Media]] * [[Medical ethics|Medical]] * [[Nursing ethics|Nursing]] * [[Professional ethics|Professional]] * [[Programming ethics|Programming]] * [[Research ethics|Research]] * [[Sexual ethics|Sexual]] * [[Ethics of technology|Technology]] * [[Ethics of terraforming|Terraforming]] * [[Ethics of uncertain sentience|Uncertain sentience]] * [[Work ethic|Work]]
| group3 = [[Metaethics|Meta]] | list3 = * [[:en:Moral absolutism|Absolutism]] * [[:en:Axiological ethics|Axiology]] * [[Cognitivism (ethics)|Cognitivism]] ** [[:en:Moral realism|Realism]] *** [[Ethical naturalism|Naturalism]] *** [[Ethical non-naturalism|Non-naturalism]] ** [[Ethical subjectivism|Subjectivism]] *** [[Ideal observer theory]] *** [[:en:Divine command theory|Divine command theory]] * [[Moral constructivism|Constructivism]] * [[:en:Euthyphro dilemma|Euthyphro dilemma]] * [[Ethical intuitionism|Intuitionism]] * [[:en:Moral nihilism|Nihilism]] * [[Non-cognitivism]] ** [[Emotivism]] ** [[Expressivism]] ** [[Quasi-realism]] ** [[Universal prescriptivism]] * [[Moral rationalism|Rationalism]] * [[Moral relativism|Relativism]] * [[:en:Moral skepticism|Skepticism]] * [[:en:Moral universalism|Universalism]] ** [[Value pluralism|Value monism – Value pluralism]]
| group4 = Schools | list4 = * [[Buddhist ethics|Buddhist]] * [[Christian ethics|Christian]] ** [[Protestant work ethic|Protestant]] * [[:en:Confucianism|Confucian]] * [[:en:Epicureanism|Epicurean]] * [[:en:Existentialism|Existentialist]] * [[Feminist ethics|Feminist]] * [[Islamic ethics|Islamic]] * [[Jewish ethics|Jewish]] * [[Kantian ethics|Kantian]] * [[Rousseauism|Rousseauian]] * [[Stoicism|Stoic]] * [[Taoism|Tao]]

| group6 = [[List of ethicists|Ethicists]] | list6 = * [[:en:en:Laozi|en:Laozi]] * [[Socrates]] * [[Plato]] * [[:en:Aristotle|Aristotle]] * [[Diogenes]] * [[Thiruvalluvar|Valluvar]] * [[:en:Cicero|Cicero]] * [[:en:Confucius|Confucius]] * [[:en:Augustine of Hippo|Augustine]] * [[:en:Mencius|Mencius]] * [[:en:Mozi|Mozi]] * [[Xunzi (philosopher)|Xunzi]] * [[Thomas Aquinas|Aquinas]] * [[:en:Baruch Spinoza|Spinoza]] * [[Joseph Butler|Butler]] * [[:en:David Hume|Hume]] * [[:en:Adam Smith|Smith]] * [[:en:Immanuel Kant|Kant]] * [[:en:Georg Wilhelm Friedrich Hegel|Hegel]] * [[:en:Arthur Schopenhauer|Schopenhauer]] * [[Jeremy Bentham|Bentham]] * [[John Stuart Mill|Mill]] * [[Søren Kierkegaard|Kierkegaard]] * [[Henry Sidgwick|Sidgwick]] * [[:en:Friedrich Nietzsche|Nietzsche]] * [[G. | group7 = Works | list7style=font-style:italic; | list7 = * [[Nicomachean Ethics]] {{smaller|(c. 322 BC)}} * [[Tirukkural]] {{smaller|(c. 450 CE)}} * [[Ethics (Spinoza book)|Ethics (Spinoza)]] {{smaller|(1677)}} * [[Fifteen Sermons Preached at the Rolls Chapel]] {{smaller|(1726)}} * [[:en:A Treatise of Human Nature|A Treatise of Human Nature]] {{smaller|(1740)}} * [[The Theory of Moral Sentiments]] {{smaller|(1759)}} * [[:en:An Introduction to the Principles of Morals and Legislation|An Introduction to the Principles of Morals and Legislation]] {{smaller|(1780)}} * [[Groundwork of the Metaphysics of Morals]] {{smaller|(1785)}} * [[Critique of Practical Reason]] {{smaller|(1788)}} * [[Elements of the Philosophy of Right]] {{smaller|(1820)}} * [[Either/Or (Kierkegaard book)|Either/Or]] {{smaller|(1843)}} * [[Utilitarianism (book)|Utilitarianism]] {{smaller|(1861)}} * [[The Methods of Ethics]] {{smaller|(1874)}} * [[On the Genealogy of Morality]] {{smaller|(1887)}} * [[Principia Ethica]] {{smaller|(1903)}} * [[:en:A Theory of Justice|A Theory of Justice]] {{smaller|(1971)}} * [[Practical Ethics]] {{smaller|(1979)}} * [[:en:After Virtue|After Virtue]] {{smaller|(1981)}} * [[Reasons and Persons]] {{smaller|(1984)}}
| group8 = Related | list8 = * [[:en:Axiology|Axiology]] * [[:en:Casuistry|Casuistry]] * [[Descriptive ethics]] * [[:en:Ethics in religion|Ethics in religion]] * [[Evolutionary ethics]] * [[History of ethics]] * [[:en:Human rights|Human rights]] * [[:en:Ideology|Ideology]] * [[:en:moral psychology|moral psychology]] * [[Philosophy of law]] * [[:en:Political philosophy|Political philosophy]] * [[Population ethics]] * [[Rehabilitation (penology)|Rehabilitation]] * [[Secular ethics]] * [[Social philosophy]] * '''[[Index of ethics articles|Index]]'''

| group2 = [[:en:Applied ethics|Applied]] | list2 = * [[:en:Animal ethics|Animal]] * [[Ethics of artificial intelligence|Artificial intelligence]] * [[:en:Bioethics|Bio]] * [[:en:Business ethics|Business]] * [[Computer ethics|Computer]] * [[Discourse ethics|Discourse]] * [[Economic ethics|Economic]] * [[Engineering ethics|Engineering]] * [[Environmental ethics|Environmental]] ** [[Land ethic|Land]] * [[Legal ethics|Legal]] * [[Machine ethics|Machine]] * [[Marketing ethics|Marketing]] * [[Ethics of eating meat|Meat eating]] * [[Media ethics|Media]] * [[Medical ethics|Medical]] * [[Nursing ethics|Nursing]] * [[Professional ethics|Professional]] * [[Programming ethics|Programming]] * [[Research ethics|Research]] * [[Sexual ethics|Sexual]] * [[Ethics of technology|Technology]] * [[Ethics of terraforming|Terraforming]] * [[Ethics of uncertain sentience|Uncertain sentience]] * [[Work ethic|Work]]
| group3 = [[Metaethics|Meta]] | list3 = * [[:en:Moral absolutism|Absolutism]] * [[:en:Axiological ethics|Axiology]] * [[Cognitivism (ethics)|Cognitivism]] ** [[:en:Moral realism|Realism]] *** [[Ethical naturalism|Naturalism]] *** [[Ethical non-naturalism|Non-naturalism]] ** [[Ethical subjectivism|Subjectivism]] *** [[Ideal observer theory]] *** [[:en:Divine command theory|Divine command theory]] * [[Moral constructivism|Constructivism]] * [[:en:Euthyphro dilemma|Euthyphro dilemma]] * [[Ethical intuitionism|Intuitionism]] * [[:en:Moral nihilism|Nihilism]] * [[Non-cognitivism]] ** [[Emotivism]] ** [[Expressivism]] ** [[Quasi-realism]] ** [[Universal prescriptivism]] * [[Moral rationalism|Rationalism]] * [[Moral relativism|Relativism]] * [[:en:Moral skepticism|Skepticism]] * [[:en:Moral universalism|Universalism]] ** [[Value pluralism|Value monism – Value pluralism]]
| group4 = Schools | list4 = * [[Buddhist ethics|Buddhist]] * [[Christian ethics|Christian]] ** [[Protestant work ethic|Protestant]] * [[:en:Confucianism|Confucian]] * [[:en:Epicureanism|Epicurean]] * [[:en:Existentialism|Existentialist]] * [[Feminist ethics|Feminist]] * [[Islamic ethics|Islamic]] * [[Jewish ethics|Jewish]] * [[Kantian ethics|Kantian]] * [[Rousseauism|Rousseauian]] * [[Stoicism|Stoic]] * [[Taoism|Tao]]
| group5 = Concepts | list5 = * [[:en:Accountability|Accountability]] * [[:en:Authority|Authority]] * [[:en:Autonomy|Autonomy]] * [[:en:Blame|Blame]] * [[:en:Common sense|Common sense]] * [[:en:Compassion|Compassion]] * [[:en:Conscience|Conscience]] * [[:en:Consent|Consent]] * [[Culture of life]] * [[Desert (philosophy)|Desert]] * [[Dignity]] * [[Double standard]] * [[:en:Duty|Duty]] * [[Egalitarianism|Equality]] * [[:en:Etiquette|Etiquette]] * [[:en:Eudaimonia|Eudaimonia]] * [[:en:Family values|Family values]] * [[Fidelity]] * [[:en:Free will|Free will]] * [[:en:Good and evil|Good and evil]] ** [[:en:Good|Good]] ** [[:en:Evil|Evil]] ** [[:en:Problem of evil|Problem of evil]] * [[Greed]] * [[:en:Happiness|Happiness]] * [[:en:Honour|Honour]] * [[Ideal (ethics)|Ideal]] * [[Immorality]] * [[Importance#Ethics, morality, and normativity|Importance]] * [[:en:Justice|Justice]] * [[:en:Liberty|Liberty]] * [[:en:Loyalty|Loyalty]] * [[Moral agency]] * [[:en:Moral courage|Moral courage]] * [[Moral hierarchy]] * [[Moral imperative]] * [[:en:Morality|Morality]] * [[:en:Norm (philosophy)|Norm]] * [[:en:Pacifism|Pacifism]] * [[:en:Political freedom|Political freedom]] * [[:en:precept|precept]] * [[:en:Punishment|Punishment]] * [[:en:Rights|Rights]] * [[Self-discipline]] * [[Suffering|Suffering]] * [[Stewardship]] * [[Sympathy]] * [[Theodicy]] * [[Torture]] * [[Trust (social science)|Trust]] * [[Utility]] * [[Value (ethics)|Value]] ** [[Instrumental and intrinsic value|Instrumental]] ** [[Intrinsic value (ethics)|Intrinsic]] ** [[:en:Japanese values|Japan]] ** [[Values (Western philosophy)|Western]] * [[Vice]] * [[Virtue]] * [[Vow]] * [[Wrongdoing|Wrong]]

| group7 = Works | list7style=font-style:italic; | list7 = * [[Nicomachean Ethics]] {{smaller|(c. 322 BC)}} * [[Tirukkural]] {{smaller|(c. 450 CE)}} * [[Ethics (Spinoza book)|Ethics (Spinoza)]] {{smaller|(1677)}} * [[Fifteen Sermons Preached at the Rolls Chapel]] {{smaller|(1726)}} * [[:en:A Treatise of Human Nature|A Treatise of Human Nature]] {{smaller|(1740)}} * [[The Theory of Moral Sentiments]] {{smaller|(1759)}} * [[:en:An Introduction to the Principles of Morals and Legislation|An Introduction to the Principles of Morals and Legislation]] {{smaller|(1780)}} * [[Groundwork of the Metaphysics of Morals]] {{smaller|(1785)}} * [[Critique of Practical Reason]] {{smaller|(1788)}} * [[Elements of the Philosophy of Right]] {{smaller|(1820)}} * [[Either/Or (Kierkegaard book)|Either/Or]] {{smaller|(1843)}} * [[Utilitarianism (book)|Utilitarianism]] {{smaller|(1861)}} * [[The Methods of Ethics]] {{smaller|(1874)}} * [[On the Genealogy of Morality]] {{smaller|(1887)}} * [[Principia Ethica]] {{smaller|(1903)}} * [[:en:A Theory of Justice|A Theory of Justice]] {{smaller|(1971)}} * [[Practical Ethics]] {{smaller|(1979)}} * [[:en:After Virtue|After Virtue]] {{smaller|(1981)}} * [[Reasons and Persons]] {{smaller|(1984)}}
| group8 = Related | list8 = * [[:en:Axiology|Axiology]] * [[:en:Casuistry|Casuistry]] * [[Descriptive ethics]] * [[:en:Ethics in religion|Ethics in religion]] * [[Evolutionary ethics]] * [[History of ethics]] * [[:en:Human rights|Human rights]] * [[:en:Ideology|Ideology]] * [[:en:moral psychology|moral psychology]] * [[Philosophy of law]] * [[:en:Political philosophy|Political philosophy]] * [[Population ethics]] * [[:en:Rehabilitation (penology)|Rehabilitation]] * [[Secular ethics]] * [[Social philosophy]] * '''[[Index of ethics articles|Index]]'''

| group2 = [[:en:Applied ethics|Applied]] | list2 = * [[:en:Animal ethics|Animal]] * [[Ethics of artificial intelligence|Artificial intelligence]] * [[:en:Bioethics|Bio]] * [[:en:Business ethics|Business]] * [[Computer ethics|Computer]] * [[Discourse ethics|Discourse]] * [[Economic ethics|Economic]] * [[Engineering ethics|Engineering]] * [[Environmental ethics|Environmental]] ** [[Land ethic|Land]] * [[Legal ethics|Legal]] * [[Machine ethics|Machine]] * [[Marketing ethics|Marketing]] * [[Ethics of eating meat|Meat eating]] * [[Media ethics|Media]] * [[Medical ethics|Medical]] * [[Nursing ethics|Nursing]] * [[Professional ethics|Professional]] * [[Programming ethics|Programming]] * [[Research ethics|Research]] * [[Sexual ethics|Sexual]] * [[Ethics of technology|Technology]] * [[Ethics of terraforming|Terraforming]] * [[Ethics of uncertain sentience|Uncertain sentience]] * [[Work ethic|Work]]
| group3 = [[Metaethics|Meta]] | list3 = * [[:en:Moral absolutism|Absolutism]] * [[:en:Axiological ethics|Axiology]] * [[Cognitivism (ethics)|Cognitivism]] ** [[:en:Moral realism|Realism]] *** [[Ethical naturalism|Naturalism]] *** [[Ethical non-naturalism|Non-naturalism]] ** [[Ethical subjectivism|Subjectivism]] *** [[Ideal observer theory]] *** [[:en:Divine command theory|Divine command theory]] * [[Moral constructivism|Constructivism]] * [[:en:Euthyphro dilemma|Euthyphro dilemma]] * [[Ethical intuitionism|Intuitionism]] * [[:en:Moral nihilism|Nihilism]] * [[Non-cognitivism]] ** [[Emotivism]] ** [[Expressivism]] ** [[Quasi-realism]] ** [[Universal prescriptivism]] * [[Moral rationalism|Rationalism]] * [[Moral relativism|Relativism]] * [[:en:Moral skepticism|Skepticism]] * [[:en:Moral universalism|Universalism]] ** [[Value pluralism|Value monism – Value pluralism]]
| group4 = Schools | list4 = * [[Buddhist ethics|Buddhist]] * [[Christian ethics|Christian]] ** [[Protestant work ethic|Protestant]] * [[:en:Confucianism|Confucian]] * [[:en:Epicureanism|Epicurean]] * [[:en:Existentialism|Existentialist]] * [[Feminist ethics|Feminist]] * [[Islamic ethics|Islamic]] * [[Jewish ethics|Jewish]] * [[Kantian ethics|Kantian]] * [[Rousseauism|Rousseauian]] * [[Stoicism|Stoic]] * [[Taoism|Tao]]
| group5 = Concepts | list5 = * [[:en:Accountability|Accountability]] * [[:en:Authority|Authority]] * [[:en:Autonomy|Autonomy]] * [[:en:Blame|Blame]] * [[:en:Common sense|Common sense]] * [[:en:Compassion|Compassion]] * [[:en:Conscience|Conscience]] * [[:en:Consent|Consent]] * [[Culture of life]] * [[Desert (philosophy)|Desert]] * [[Dignity]] * [[Double standard]] * [[:en:Duty|Duty]] * [[Egalitarianism|Equality]] * [[:en:Etiquette|Etiquette]] * [[:en:Eudaimonia|Eudaimonia]] * [[:en:Family values|Family values]] * [[Fidelity]] * [[:en:Free will|Free will]] * [[:en:Good and evil|Good and evil]] ** [[:en:Good|Good]] ** [[:en:Evil|Evil]] ** [[:en:Problem of evil|Problem of evil]] * [[Greed]] * [[:en:Happiness|Happiness]] * [[:en:Honour|Honour]] * [[Ideal (ethics)|Ideal]] * [[Immorality]] * [[Importance#Ethics, morality, and normativity|Importance]] * [[:en:Justice|Justice]] * [[:en:Liberty|Liberty]] * [[:en:Loyalty|Loyalty]] * [[Moral agency]] * [[:en:Moral courage|Moral courage]] * [[Moral hierarchy]] * [[Moral imperative]] * [[:en:Morality|Morality]] * [[:en:Norm (philosophy)|Norm]] * [[:en:Pacifism|Pacifism]] * [[:en:Political freedom|Political freedom]] * [[:en:precept|precept]] * [[:en:Punishment|Punishment]] * [[:en:Rights|Rights]] * [[Self-discipline]] * [[Suffering|Suffering]] * [[Stewardship]] * [[Sympathy]] * [[Theodicy]] * [[Torture]] * [[Trust (social science)|Trust]] * [[Utility]] * [[Value (ethics)|Value]] ** [[Instrumental and intrinsic value|Instrumental]] ** [[Intrinsic value (ethics)|Intrinsic]] ** [[:en:Japanese values|Japan]] ** [[Values (Western philosophy)|Western]] * [[Vice]] * [[Virtue]] * [[Vow]] * [[Wrongdoing|Wrong]]

E. Moore|Moore]] * [[:en:Karl Barth|Barth]] * [[:en:Paul Tillich|Tillich]] * [[Dietrich Bonhoeffer|Bonhoeffer]] * [[Philippa Foot|Foot]] * [[:en:John Rawls|Rawls]] * [[John Dewey|Dewey]] * [[:en:Bernard Williams|Williams]] * [[:en:J. | group1 = [[:en:Normative ethics|Normative]] | list1 = * [[:en:Consequentialism|Consequentialism]] * [[Deontological ethics|Deontology]] * [[Ethics of care|Care]] * [[:en:Moral particularism|Particularism]] * [[Pragmatic ethics|Pragmatic]] * [[:en:Role ethics|Role]] * [[Suffering-focused ethics|Suffering-focused]] * [[:en:Utilitarianism|Utilitarianism]] * [[Virtue ethics|Virtue]]
| group2 = [[:en:Applied ethics|Applied]] | list2 = * [[:en:Animal ethics|Animal]] * [[Ethics of artificial intelligence|Artificial intelligence]] * [[:en:Bioethics|Bio]] * [[:en:Business ethics|Business]] * [[Computer ethics|Computer]] * [[Discourse ethics|Discourse]] * [[Economic ethics|Economic]] * [[Engineering ethics|Engineering]] * [[Environmental ethics|Environmental]] ** [[Land ethic|Land]] * [[Legal ethics|Legal]] * [[Machine ethics|Machine]] * [[Marketing ethics|Marketing]] * [[Ethics of eating meat|Meat eating]] * [[Media ethics|Media]] * [[Medical ethics|Medical]] * [[Nursing ethics|Nursing]] * [[Professional ethics|Professional]] * [[Programming ethics|Programming]] * [[Research ethics|Research]] * [[Sexual ethics|Sexual]] * [[Ethics of technology|Technology]] * [[Ethics of terraforming|Terraforming]] * [[Ethics of uncertain sentience|Uncertain sentience]] * [[:en:work ethic|Work]]
| group3 = [[Metaethics|Meta]] | list3 = * [[:en:Moral absolutism|Absolutism]] * [[:en:Axiological ethics|Axiology]] * [[Cognitivism (ethics)|Cognitivism]] ** [[:en:Moral realism|Realism]] *** [[Ethical naturalism|Naturalism]] *** [[Ethical non-naturalism|Non-naturalism]] ** [[Ethical subjectivism|Subjectivism]] *** [[Ideal observer theory]] *** [[:en:Divine command theory|Divine command theory]] * [[Moral constructivism|Constructivism]] * [[:en:Euthyphro dilemma|Euthyphro dilemma]] * [[Ethical intuitionism|Intuitionism]] * [[:en:Moral nihilism|Nihilism]] * [[Non-cognitivism]] ** [[Emotivism]] ** [[Expressivism]] ** [[Quasi-realism]] ** [[Universal prescriptivism]] * [[Moral rationalism|Rationalism]] * [[Moral relativism|Relativism]] * [[:en:Moral skepticism|Skepticism]] * [[:en:Moral universalism|Universalism]] ** [[Value pluralism|Value monism – Value pluralism]]
| group4 = Schools | list4 = * [[Buddhist ethics|Buddhist]] * [[Christian ethics|Christian]] ** [[Protestant work ethic|Protestant]] * [[:en:Confucianism|Confucian]] * [[:en:Epicureanism|Epicurean]] * [[:en:Existentialism|Existentialist]] * [[Feminist ethics|Feminist]] * [[Islamic ethics|Islamic]] * [[Jewish ethics|Jewish]] * [[Kantian ethics|Kantian]] * [[Rousseauism|Rousseauian]] * [[Stoicism|Stoic]] * [[Taoism|Tao]]

Moore|Moore]] * [[:en:Karl Barth|Barth]] * [[:en:Paul Tillich|Tillich]] * [[Dietrich Bonhoeffer|Bonhoeffer]] * [[Philippa Foot|Foot]] * [[:en:John Rawls|Rawls]] * [[John Dewey|Dewey]] * [[:en:Bernard Williams|Williams]] * [[:en:J. | group3 = [[Metaethics|Meta]] | list3 = * [[:en:Moral absolutism|Absolutism]] * [[:en:Axiological ethics|Axiology]] * [[Cognitivism (ethics)|Cognitivism]] ** [[:en:Moral realism|Realism]] *** [[Ethical naturalism|Naturalism]] *** [[Ethical non-naturalism|Non-naturalism]] ** [[Ethical subjectivism|Subjectivism]] *** [[Ideal observer theory]] *** [[:en:Divine command theory|Divine command theory]] * [[Moral constructivism|Constructivism]] * [[:en:Euthyphro dilemma|Euthyphro dilemma]] * [[Ethical intuitionism|Intuitionism]] * [[:en:Moral nihilism|Nihilism]] * [[Non-cognitivism]] ** [[Emotivism]] ** [[Expressivism]] ** [[Quasi-realism]] ** [[Universal prescriptivism]] * [[Moral rationalism|Rationalism]] * [[Moral relativism|Relativism]] * [[:en:Moral skepticism|Skepticism]] * [[:en:Moral universalism|Universalism]] ** [[Value pluralism|Value monism – Value pluralism]]
